b: ^This stale pack of gum is sticky, flexible... Could be just the thing for filling up a puncture.
^I find my pack of Extra Sweetmint gum left on the passenger seat. How long has this been sitting here?

inventory_tutorial: ^I should probably keep track of the junk I keep stuffing in my pockets. If I hit [TAB], I can take a closer look at my clipboard and inspect what I've found.
^These items can be dragged from my inventory to the clueboard as evidence to connect to a suspect.
